page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.12xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor running at 3.3 GHz. The instance features 48 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, providing 48 vCPUs. It is equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

This server does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for persistent data. It features a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. There are no integrated GPU accelerators, making it unsuitable for hardware-accelerated graphics or deep learning workloads. The KVM-virtualized environment ensures dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading overhead.

The high memory-to-CPU ratio and dedicated core allocation position this server as a memory-optimized resource. It is designed for workloads requiring significant memory capacity and predictable CPU performance without SMT interference, such as in-memory databases, enterprise applications, and memory-intensive data processing pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.12xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server powered by an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor operating at 3.3 GHz. It features 48 dedicated physical cores with one thread per core, delivering 48 vCPUs alongside 384.0 GB of RAM. This configuration provides a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core, supported by a KVM hypervisor. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive applications, such as in-memory databases, large-scale caching layers, and enterprise resource planning systems, where dedicated CPU execution and high memory density are required.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.12xlarge is a memory-optimized server featuring 48 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 384 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon cores and high memory density for demanding database and enterprise workloads.
